name: Flow 11 — Auto Apply (Email mit CV + Portfolio)

parameters.query: SELECT j.id, c.name AS company_name, j.job_title, j.location, j.contact_email, j.job_type, j.working_hours, je.parsed_json FROM jobs j LEFT JOIN companies c ON c.tenant_id = j.tenant_id AND c.company_id = j.company_id LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT parsed_json FROM job_events WHERE job_id = j.id ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1 ) je ON true WHERE j.contact_email IS NOT NULL AND j.auto_applied_at IS NULL AND j.created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '48 hours' ORDER BY j.created_at DESC LIMIT 20;

parameters.body:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'qwen/qwen3-30b-a3b-instruct-2507', max_tokens: 80, messages: [{ role: 'system', content: '/no_think
Schreibe eine kurze Phrase (max. 15 Wörter), die im Satz nach dem Wort "weil" steht. Klein beginnen. KEIN "weil" am Anfang. Kein Punkt. Beispiel: "mich Ihr Fokus auf Automatisierung und der pragmatische Tech-Stack überzeugt haben"' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Firma: ' + $json.company_name + '
Stelle: ' + $json.job_title + '
Info: ' + (($json.parsed_json && typeof $json.parsed_json === 'object') ? ($json.parsed_json.summary || '') : '') }] }) }}

parameters.query: UPDATE jobs SET auto_applied_at = NOW() WHERE id = $1;
